ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the size belongs to (e.g., US, EU, UK, CM, WOMEN_US) */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value for the region */,
  "is_women" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the size is for women */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is for (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is for (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "from_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source size */,
  "to_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target size */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor used to convert the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the rule is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rules_from_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rules_to_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_sizes" (
  "brand_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand size */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "brand_size_value" REAL /* Brand-specific size value */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or advice for the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the size is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, customer_service) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "foot_length" REAL /* Length of the user's foot in inches */,
  "foot_width" REAL /* Width of the user's foot in inches */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred shoe size */,
  "preferred_brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred brand */,
  "foot_volume" REAL /* Volume of the user's foot */,
  "foot_arch_type" TEXT /* Type of foot arch (e.g., flat, normal, high) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the size chart is for */,
  "chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the size chart image */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the chart is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., men, women, kids) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity available for the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the size is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_tool" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "source_region" TEXT /* Source region for the size conversion */,
  "source_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source size */,
  "target_region" TEXT /* Target region for the size conversion */,
  "target_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target size */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "was_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the conversion was successful */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback for the conversion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_tool_source_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_tool_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_tool_target_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_requests" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return request */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the return was requested */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the return request */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_requests_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_items" (
  "return_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return item */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return request */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for returning the product */,
  "is_refund_issue" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if there is an issue with the refund */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_items_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES return_requests ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (0.0-1.0) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the recommendation was accepted by the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
